name: Rotini Con Funghi e Pinoli (Rotini with Mushr
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Shiitake mushrooms - stems trimmed and diced
1 lb Rotini, penne, capellini or spaghettini
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together 1/2 cup olive oil, vinegar, hot pepper flakes, minced garlic and black pepper to taste. Add the trimmed and diced shiitake mushrooms and toss to coat them. Cover and chill for at least 6 hours or overnight.
2. In a large skillet, heat remaining 2 tbsp olive oil over low heat. Cook the garlic and shallots until softened. Add the prosciutto and cook for another minute.
3. Add the mushroom mixture, sun-dried tomatoes, and olives to the skillet and cook over moderate heat for 5 minutes.
4. Pour in the white wine and chicken broth, then bring to a boil for 3 minutes. Stir in the chopped parsley and let it simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, cook the rotini according to package instructions until al dente. Drain well.
6. Toss the cooked pasta with the mushroom sauce, toasted pine nuts, and grated Parmesan cheese. Serve hot.
